data.description: Load a file to be used in your project.

concurrency_multithreading.info: When multiple files are being processed, the number of files to process concurrently.
concurrency_multithreading.name: concurrency_multithreading

delete_server_file_after_processing.info: If true, the Server File Path will be deleted after processing.
delete_server_file_after_processing.name: delete_server_file_after_processing

file_path.info: Data object with a 'file_path' property pointing to server file or a Message object with a path to the file. Supercedes 'Path' but supports same file types.
file_path.name: file_path

ignore_unspecified_files.info: If true, Data with no 'file_path' property will be ignored.
ignore_unspecified_files.name: ignore_unspecified_files

ignore_unsupported_extensions.info: If true, files with unsupported extensions will not be processed.
ignore_unsupported_extensions.name: ignore_unsupported_extensions

path.info: Supported file extensions: txt, md, mdx, csv, json, yaml, yml, xml, html, htm, pdf, docx, py, sh, sql, js, ts, tsx, sqlite; optionally bundled in file extensions: zip, tar, tgz, bz2, gz
path.name: path

separator.info: Specify the separator to use between multiple outputs in Message format.
separator.name: separator

silent_errors.info: If true, errors will not raise an exception.
silent_errors.name: silent_errors

use_multithreading.info: Set 'Processing Concurrency' greater than 1 to enable multithreading.
use_multithreading.name: use_multithreading

data.description: Split text into chunks based on specified criteria.

chunk_overlap.info: Number of characters to overlap between chunks.
chunk_overlap.name: chunk_overlap

chunk_size.info: The maximum length of each chunk. Text is first split by separator, then chunks are merged up to this size. Individual splits larger than this won't be further divided.
chunk_size.name: chunk_size

data_inputs.info: The data with texts to split in chunks.
data_inputs.name: data_inputs

keep_separator.info: Whether to keep the separator in the output chunks and where to place it.
keep_separator.name: keep_separator

separator.name: separator

text_key.info: The key to use for the text column.
text_key.name: text_key

data.description: Ingest and search documents in Astra DB

advanced_search_filter.info: Optional dictionary of filters to apply to the search query.
advanced_search_filter.name: advanced_search_filter

api_endpoint.info: The API Endpoint for the Astra DB instance. Supercedes database selection.
api_endpoint.name: api_endpoint

astradb_vectorstore_kwargs.info: Optional dictionary of additional parameters for the AstraDBVectorStore.
astradb_vectorstore_kwargs.name: astradb_vectorstore_kwargs

autodetect_collection.info: Boolean flag to determine whether to autodetect the collection.
autodetect_collection.name: autodetect_collection

collection_name.info: The name of the collection within Astra DB where the vectors will be stored.
collection_name.name: collection_name

content_field.info: Field to use as the text content field for the vector store.
content_field.name: content_field

database_name.info: The Database name for the Astra DB instance.
database_name.name: database_name

deletion_field.info: When this parameter is provided, documents in the target collection with metadata field values matching the input metadata field value will be deleted before new data is loaded.
deletion_field.name: deletion_field

embedding_model.info: Specify the Embedding Model. Not required for Astra Vectorize collections.
embedding_model.name: embedding_model

environment.info: The environment for the Astra DB API Endpoint.
environment.name: environment

ignore_invalid_documents.info: Boolean flag to determine whether to ignore invalid documents at runtime.
ignore_invalid_documents.name: ignore_invalid_documents

keyspace.info: Optional keyspace within Astra DB to use for the collection.
keyspace.name: keyspace

lexical_terms.info: Add additional terms/keywords to augment search precision.
lexical_terms.name: lexical_terms

number_of_results.info: Number of search results to return.
number_of_results.name: number_of_results

reranker.info: Post-retrieval model that re-scores results for optimal relevance ranking.
reranker.name: reranker

search_method.info: Determine how your content is matched: Vector finds semantic similarity, and Hybrid Search (suggested) combines both approaches with a reranker.
search_method.name: search_method

search_query.info: Enter a query to run a similarity search.
search_query.name: search_query

search_score_threshold.info: Minimum similarity score threshold for search results. (when using 'Similarity with score threshold')
search_score_threshold.name: search_score_threshold

should_cache_vector_store.info: If True, the vector store will be cached for the current build of the component. This is useful for components that have multiple output methods and want to share the same vector store.
should_cache_vector_store.name: should_cache_vector_store

token.info: Authentication token for accessing Astra DB.
token.name: token

api_base.info: Base URL for the API. Leave empty for default.
api_base.name: api_base

base_url_ibm_watsonx.info: The base URL of the API (IBM watsonx.ai only)
base_url_ibm_watsonx.name: base_url_ibm_watsonx

dimensions.info: The number of dimensions the resulting output embeddings should have. Only supported by certain models.
dimensions.name: dimensions

input_text.display_name: Include the original text in the output
input_text.name: input_text

model_kwargs.info: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the model.
model_kwargs.name: model_kwargs

project_id.info: IBM watsonx.ai Project ID (required for IBM watsonx.ai)
project_id.name: project_id

data.description: Iterates over a list of Data or Message objects, processing one item at a time and aggregating results from loop inputs. Message objects are automatically converted to Data objects for consistent processing.

data.name: data

input_data.info: Accepts either a DataFrame or a Data object.
input_data.name: input_data

mode.info: Convert into raw string instead of using a template.
mode.name: mode

pattern.info: Use variables within curly brackets to extract column values for DataFrames or key values for Data.For example: `Name: {Name}, Age: {Age}, Country: {Country}`
pattern.name: pattern

data.description: Define the agent's instructions, then enter a task to complete using tools.

add_current_date_tool.info: If true, will add a tool to the agent that returns the current date.
add_current_date_tool.name: add_current_date_tool

agent_description.info: The description of the agent. This is only used when in Tool Mode. Defaults to 'A helpful assistant with access to the following tools:' and tools are added dynamically. This feature is deprecated and
agent_description.name: agent_description
agent_description.value: A helpful assistant with access to the following tools:

agent_llm.info: The provider of the language model that the agent will use to generate responses.
agent_llm.name: agent_llm

api_key.info: The OpenAI API Key to use for the OpenAI model.
api_key.name: api_key

format_instructions.info: Generic Template for structured output formatting. Valid only with Structured response.
format_instructions.name: format_instructions

handle_parsing_errors.info: Should the Agent fix errors when reading user input for better processing?
handle_parsing_errors.name: handle_parsing_errors

input_value.info: The input provided by the user for the agent to process.
input_value.name: input_value

max_iterations.info: The maximum number of attempts the agent can make to complete its task before it stops.
max_iterations.name: max_iterations

max_retries.info: The maximum number of retries to make when generating.
max_retries.name: max_retries

max_tokens.info: The maximum number of tokens to generate. Set to 0 for unlimited tokens.
max_tokens.name: max_tokens

model_kwargs.info: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the model.
model_kwargs.name: model_kwargs

model_name.info: To see the model names, first choose a provider. Then, enter your API key and click the refresh button next to the model name.
model_name.name: model_name

n_messages.info: Number of chat history messages to retrieve.
n_messages.name: n_messages

openai_api_base.info: The base URL of the OpenAI API. Defaults to https://api.openai.com/v1. You can change this to use other APIs like JinaChat, LocalAI and Prem.
openai_api_base.name: openai_api_base

output_schema.info: Schema Validation: Define the structure and data types for structured output. No validation if no output schema.
output_schema.name: output_schema

seed.info: The seed controls the reproducibility of the job.
seed.name: seed

system_prompt.info: System Prompt: Initial instructions and context provided to guide the agent's behavior.
system_prompt.name: system_prompt
system_prompt.value: You are a helpful assistant that can use tools to answer questions and perform tasks.

timeout.info: The timeout for requests to OpenAI completion API.
timeout.name: timeout

tools.info: These are the tools that the agent can use to help with tasks.
tools.name: tools

agent_description.info: The description of the agent. This is only used when in Tool Mode. Defaults to 'A helpful assistant with access to the following tools:' and tools are added dynamically. This feature is deprecated and
agent_description.name: agent_description
agent_description.value: A helpful assistant with access to the following tools:

agent_llm.info: The provider of the language model that the agent will use to generate responses.
agent_llm.name: agent_llm

api_key.info: The OpenAI API Key to use for the OpenAI model.
api_key.name: api_key

format_instructions.info: Generic Template for structured output formatting. Valid only with Structured response.
format_instructions.name: format_instructions

handle_parsing_errors.info: Should the Agent fix errors when reading user input for better processing?
handle_parsing_errors.name: handle_parsing_errors

input_value.info: The input provided by the user for the agent to process.
input_value.name: input_value

max_iterations.info: The maximum number of attempts the agent can make to complete its task before it stops.
max_iterations.name: max_iterations

max_retries.info: The maximum number of retries to make when generating.
max_retries.name: max_retries

max_tokens.info: The maximum number of tokens to generate. Set to 0 for unlimited tokens.
max_tokens.name: max_tokens

model_kwargs.info: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the model.
model_kwargs.name: model_kwargs

model_name.info: To see the model names, first choose a provider. Then, enter your API key and click the refresh button next to the model name.
model_name.name: model_name

n_messages.info: Number of chat history messages to retrieve.
n_messages.name: n_messages

openai_api_base.info: The base URL of the OpenAI API. Defaults to https://api.openai.com/v1. You can change this to use other APIs like JinaChat, LocalAI and Prem.
openai_api_base.name: openai_api_base

output_schema.info: Schema Validation: Define the structure and data types for structured output. No validation if no output schema.
output_schema.name: output_schema

seed.info: The seed controls the reproducibility of the job.
seed.name: seed

system_prompt.info: System Prompt: Initial instructions and context provided to guide the agent's behavior.
system_prompt.name: system_prompt
system_prompt.value: You are a helpful assistant that can use tools to answer questions and perform tasks.

timeout.info: The timeout for requests to OpenAI completion API.
timeout.name: timeout

tools.info: These are the tools that the agent can use to help with tasks.
tools.name: tools

data.description: Display a chat message in the Playground.

clean_data.info: Whether to clean data before converting to string.
clean_data.name: clean_data

context_id.info: The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.
context_id.name: context_id

data_template.info: Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.
data_template.name: data_template

input_value.info: Message to be passed as output.
input_value.name: input_value

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

should_store_message.info: Store the message in the history.
should_store_message.name: should_store_message

data.description: Generate embeddings using a specified provider.

api_base.info: Base URL for the API. Leave empty for default.
api_base.name: api_base

base_url_ibm_watsonx.info: The base URL of the API (IBM watsonx.ai only)
base_url_ibm_watsonx.name: base_url_ibm_watsonx

dimensions.info: The number of dimensions the resulting output embeddings should have. Only supported by certain models.
dimensions.name: dimensions

input_text.display_name: Include the original text in the output
input_text.name: input_text

model_kwargs.info: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the model.
model_kwargs.name: model_kwargs

project_id.info: IBM watsonx.ai Project ID (required for IBM watsonx.ai)
project_id.name: project_id
